source_quote: seals 3023, 2358... didiir aa
notes: Unicorn=Market Common. 'didiir'=just expressed/instant. 'aa'=cow/milk.

source_quote: seals 3023, 2358... didiir aa
notes: Identical reading to 3023; same product, same Market Common.

source_quote: very good ghee (seal 1076, thava ne-y)
notes: Tally-4 provides phoneme 'na' → na+y = ney (ghee). thava=very good.

proposed_meaning_english: Carer of three cows of Isaa (Shiva)
source_quote: iisaa muu aagaavva = carer of three cows of Isaa (Shiva)
notes: Tally-3 provides count 'muu'=three. Isaa=Shiva. Donated cows for temple. Unicorn=Market Common temple location.

source_quote: 2648 (elephant) = mi mi na y thoLzu = very good ghee shed
notes: Elephant motif = Elephant Street. Tally-4 provides 'na' → ney=ghee. thoLzu=shed.

source_quote: producer of sesame 'ghee' (seal 2127), (eNNey in Tamil)
notes: Elephant Street. eNNey=sesame oil in Tamil. Still in use today.

source_quote: Zebu/Tiger Street: Associated with high-value cattle shed (seal 1386), a composite motif combining many streets or many sheds
notes: Composite motif = multiple street jurisdictions combined.

proposed_meaning_english: Order of the Leader — Market Common jurisdiction
source_quote: Seals 2444 and 2864, both carry the command 'aNNa(l) kai aaNai' (Order of the Leader)
notes: Same law as 2864 but unicorn motif = applies to Market Common.

proposed_meaning_english: Order of the Leader — Gharial/Riverine jurisdiction
source_quote: Seals 2444 and 2864, both carry the command 'aNNa(l) kai aaNai'... other a Gharial jurisdiction
notes: Identical inscription to 2444; gharial motif = riverine district.

source_quote: Citywide curfew (seal 4440)
notes: No motif = city-wide universal ordinance. Not location-restricted.

source_quote: law from a farmers' guilds (seal 4371)
notes: No motif = city-wide. Not location-restricted.

source_quote: a skill certification for a worker (seal 4284)
notes: No motif = not location-restricted.

proposed_meaning_english: The world is a Big Home
source_quote: seal 2234 reads as 'vayya yiir illam', 'The world is a Big Home', at the Market Common, and Bull Street, as a guiding banner
notes: Displayed as banner at Market Common and Bull Street. Explains absence of military imagery. 'guards' = carers.

proposed_meaning_english: Panic milk mandate for infants and children
source_quote: seal 4718, 'panic milk for children'. A seal without a motif, it is an ordinance mandating fresh milk from on-demand cows
notes: City-wide ordinance. No motif=universal. On-demand cows bridge milking schedules for infant nutrition.

source_quote: 3016 didiir fresh milk
notes: Unicorn=Market Common. Stacked milking schedule announcement for Market Common milk cow shed.

proposed_meaning_english: Homes for the aged and alone
source_quote: Seal 1425 'illam vaya muu thani', 'Homes for the aged and alone'
notes: No motif = not a business, city-wide provision. Elder care facility.

source_quote: seal 5119, 'muu da aa thoLzu', 'shed for aged cattle'
notes: Unicorn=Market Common. Aged cattle yield manure=fertiliser. Sustainability integration.

source_quote: seal 3246 'vayamuula aagaavva', carer of aged cattle... This transition from linear to integrated writing is a key indicator of a mature, professionally managed script
notes: Documents compound sign evolution: sign 10 (kaa) → sign 12 (kaavva) → sign 15 (aakaavva=cow carer).

source_quote: Seal 1110 identifies a 'respected equanimous great leader', who is found at the Market Common, functioning as an adjudicating mediator in commercial disagreements
notes: Unicorn=Market Common location. Leader=aNNa or aNNal (Elder and Leader).

phoneme_string: v va da d Lz vya mu r muraa
source_quote: seal (2617), 'buttermilk available HERE'. People are not reading the permit seal, but a large banner or sign board
notes: Single ditto mark reads only one preceding sound. Seal implies a banner permit, not a product seal. Evidence for widespread literacy and public signage.

phoneme_string: mi mi KoLzi (ur) kaa v va
proposed_meaning_english: Very good care of KoLzi village
source_quote: 'Care of the village' (seal 2503, 1228)

phoneme_string: mi mi koLzi aa ka v va
proposed_meaning_english: Very good cow care of KoLzi village
source_quote: 'Care of the village' (seal 2503, 1228)
related laws (seal 8117) of the KoLzi village
notes: No motif = city/village-wide ordinance.

proposed_meaning_english: Residence of the king's advisors and grain store
source_quote: a new interpretation of the famous Dholavera signboard reading as the 'residence of the king's advisors and grain store', paralleling the seals 1110, 2503, and 8117
notes: Famous 10-sign Dholavira inscription. Leader referred to as aNNa or aNNal (Elder and Leader).
